title: rhododendron × sesterianum
intro: Rhododendron × sesterianum, also known as Sesteria, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the rhododendron family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Sesteria include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin irritations. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by steeping the leaves or flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
